creator: rotkaps_spam_trap@gmx.de
text:
After I upgraded the math/fftw3 port I cannot run amarokapp:

,----
| # amarokapp
| /libexec/ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libgcc_s.so.1" not found, required by "libfftw3.so.4"
`----

I compiled the fftw3 port WITHOUT_FORTRAN, so the lang/gcc43 port is
NOT used.

,----[ /var/db/ports/fftw3/options ]
| # This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
| # No user-servicable parts inside!
| # Options for fftw3-3.2
| _OPTIONS_READ=fftw3-3.2
| WITHOUT_OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS=true
| WITHOUT_FORTRAN=true
`----

I recompiled amarok, but after that it still shows the errormesage
above.

How can i run amarok?

How-To-Repeat: run amarokapp on FreeBSD6 with all ports up to date (on may, 19zh)
